calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshar, Clerk Carla Amador, Susan Lee CSR #4280 (218/206)

Appearances:
Rob Castle, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Hawthorne/Stone Real Estate Investments, Inc.
Julian Thomas Lastowski representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Dwaine Walker is present.
Jaime Rush representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. Counsel and parties herein stipulate that Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshar may sit and hear this matter. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties hereby enter into a conditional settlement agreement, which was fully recited on the record by Julian Thomas Lastowski as follows:

Defendant, Dwaine Walker, agree to vacate the premises located on 757 Levenworth, Apartment 601 in San Francisco, California on or before 12:00 a.m. on November 15, 2007. The premises is to be left in a "swept clean" condition. The lease agreement is deem terminated. Defendant will pay the sum of $5,000.00 on or before November 15, 2007 and plaintiff will dismiss this action. Defendant will not create any further nuisances as described on the record by respective counsel. Defendant will surrender all keys and warrants that he is the sole tenant/occupant of the premises. Each side will bear its own attorney's fees incurred. A neutral letter will be written on behalf of the defendant stating that that he was a tenant and paid all of his rent on time. The parties entered into a waiver of rent. Plaintiff will return the security deposit as prescribed by law. This stipulation may be enforced into a judgment. Parties understand and concur with the settlement stated for the record. The trial date of September 17, 2007 is vacated.
